summary: Bulk add company users to projects
description:
This endpoint allows company users to be bulk added to multiple projects with a permission template in one request.
If the user was already part of that project it will not update the assigned permission template.

entities.description: One key for each user ID passed in, with an array of project IDs for that nested user ID

userId.description: User Id of the user that was added to the project

projects.description: One key for each project ID for the user ID

users.description: Array of existing company users with a permission template id and project id that they will be assinged to. The maximum amount per request is 1000 user_id, project_id, permission_template_id triple...

user_id.description: The ID of the user to add

project_id.description: The ID of project to add the user to

permission_template_id.description: The ID of the permission template to assign to the user
